title: Duplicate card authorization after client timeout
body: When checkout times out and retries, some customers see a second pending authorization. Settled charges are not duplicated. Request IDs show the retry omitted the idempotency key.

title: OAuth callback rejects uppercase redirect host
body: Login fails with invalid_redirect_uri when the configured callback host contains uppercase characters. Lowercase works. Reproduction and logs attached.

title: Typo in Python quickstart environment variable
body: The Python quickstart says OPEN_API_KEY but the SDK reads OPENAI_API_KEY. Please correct the documentation.

title: Add dark mode to API explorer
body: Please add a dark theme to the API explorer. This is a feature request; there is no current functional failure.

title: CI logs expose deployment token
body: A deployment token is printed in plaintext when the release job fails before authentication. We revoked the observed token. Logs are private but accessible to the engineering organization.

title: Build is broken please fix
body: The build stopped working this morning. No repository, job URL, error text, or reproduction steps were included.

title: Webhook events delivered twice after 502 retry
body: A subscriber returned 502 once. The retry used a new delivery identifier and the customer processed the event twice. Expected redelivery to preserve the delivery identity.

title: Billing CSV timestamps ignore account timezone
body: Monthly invoice CSV exports render timestamps in UTC even when the account timezone is America/Chicago. The web billing view shows local time correctly.

title: All users receive 500 during login
body: Production login returns HTTP 500 for every tenant after the 14:00 UTC deploy. Rollback restores access. This is a current global authentication outage.

title: Python sample uses deprecated Chat Completions parameter
body: The structured-output Python sample still passes response_format to an old Chat Completions example. Update it to the current Responses API example.
